clear-all.title: Clear history?
clear-all.desc: This will remove all scan, update, and action history. Logs and quarantine items will not be affected.

clear-acknowledged.title: Clear acknowledged entries?
clear-acknowledged.desc: This will remove only acknowledged history entries. Unresolved events will remain.

clear-errors.title: Clear all errors?
clear-errors.desc: This will remove all errors in the history table. Rest of these events will remain.

clear-warnings.title: Clear all warnings?
clear-warnings.desc: This will remove all warnings in the history table. Rest of these events will remain.

restore.title: This will restore the file from quarantine.

delete.title: Are you sure to delete this file permanently?

bulk-restore.title: This will restore all quarantined threats.

bulk-delete.title: Are you sure to delete all quarantined threats?

delete-settings.title: This will permanently delete all ClamAV GUI settings, exclusions, and preferences.

restore-defaults.title: This will permanently restore all ClamAV GUI settings, exclusions, and preferences into default values.

delete-threats.title: Are you sure to delete this file permanently?

clear-threats.title: Are you sure to delete all detected threats?

delete-job.title: This will remove the selected scheduled scan job

clear-jobs.title: This will remove all scheduled scan jobs
